description: Editable subset of `Dataset` fields. Maps to TS `Partial<Pick<Dataset, "name" | "description" | "purpose" | "tags">>` — every field is optional and `None` means "leave alone".

purpose.description: Intended use of a dataset — drives the colored badge on the picker and lets apps route additions to the right backend (eval suite, training set, replay corpus, manual review queue).

title: DatasetPatch
